textByHashes.fd57fafe4460469c3a804350c6b926c3c9c0453a: Dat nice. Burntmeat always cook lovely burnt meat for you when you help us before.
textByHashes.2fbd05b8a19c817b26a2fb0a9b3a77131969cf1d: What Burntmeat need from you dis time?
textByHashes.57068fac8a81e30e3f6485102b0d7308ffc99fdc: 'An Burntmeat choose My Arm to go? Dat sound like great honour! It make good sense, too - My Arm got all da goutweed knowledge.
textByHashes.53bc29928aa4f2d3bd9a30c45d1e62fa44d50288: Stronghold trolls not really invented much else. We know bashing things with rocks make 'em dead, but maybe Weiss trolls know dat already.
textByHashes.9f755d8d8afe33673958273e3b5b710269ec1680: But dat not a problem, . My Arm know lots 'bout growing goutweed. It gonna be fine.
textByHashes.ccaad9868a813eefb992027603b273faf9c0578e: Eh... My Arm not mind. My Arm like seeing places, like dat jungle village where da nice people give us goutweed stuff.
textByHashes.b3d1a738ed6348b7d6b0cf5dc07ab5cf27427cd1: Anyway, My Arm not mind going to Weiss. No family here now, not since My Other Arm died. Got apprentice ready to take over goutweed farming. Dis gonna be fine.
textByHashes.b4d65d0f937c0990adc19e36a36aed14a8b5a262: My Arm been on boat before, an' not like it. But My Arm not like crossing cold mountain either... eh, we better go by boat. You got a boat ready?
textByHashes.66c36bf1301cc6224592c9f3a17584e4fdda24c4: Okieday, My Arm know how to find it. It on coast near smelly fur-wearing human town you call Rellekka. See you in a bit.
textByHashes.1543efea0280089842a12b657c22cb48eee6e49f: My Arm look forward to getting on with da job when you ready!
textByHashes.2f21bccd0a0eea59a8361472613896fddf5826c0: My Arm very excited 'bout going to Weiss to teach stuff to da trolls. Better hope dey like hearing 'bout goutweed.
textByHashes.ae48a24538f0e564727eaf503fc67b4990a86d0c: My Arm know da place, it on coast near smelly fur- wearing human town you call Rellekka. See you in a bit.
textByHashes.347c1bb90d5a83bb6f5fc96b2fc939eabf759687: Dat 'thing' is a troll, an' My Arm not like being called a thing!
textByHashes.0b2ddb317a2de1e848aa75a7d3fae619c86f7f3b: My Arm is a farmer, yup! Got a farm.
textByHashes.014b9953f5d5cc616d0368544633548545b9808f: Eh, , My Arm thinks dis human kinda dumb. Can we use boat or not? My Arm getting bored.
textByHashes.44a97bfce861698ad4802f9d55f96f2bc57f13e4: You going too slow. Let My Arm drive!
textByHashes.887a2d43f67f64bc3f28b661655e8e9425978a9b: My Arm didn't know boats could go backwards.
textByHashes.5d92484dba2d8451419c890cb05dbaca0b555d6b: You gettin' angry with My Arm again?
textByHashes.9e7362f44abe442eb888cc1302525f221345ac57: Dis boat smell of bird poo.
textByHashes.2dbd74509374498830d163d27574047066cdebfb: Well, we here. My Arm not enjoyed boat ride. Weiss must be up top of cliff, but My Arm not gonna be able to climb up.
textByHashes.89a4c220f64e7bfd055e87b84ec70eb6658a7e41: My Arm not gonna be able to climb dat. Maybe you look for other way first?
textByHashes.b2eca784f8566f44bc37f952fca7c1e2696f602c: My Arm not gonna be able to get through dat hole. It got all rocks in da way. You wanna clear it?
textByHashes.ac908f9e881b7c14147a085351a8b97310bb2b3e: My Arm very pleased to see Snowflake.
textByHashes.d24f85b0728026839095779fcb236f6b4bfe1118: My Arm got named My Arm by my dad, after My Arm tried to nibble his arm... sorry, My Arm not want to bore you.
textByHashes.db14e2943e6ecf8d4afd86348a890f80cc2243c2: Dat a pretty name. For a pretty troll. Maybe you get to know My Arm better soon?
textByHashes.c7ce5796fc666cac782a8ecafa1ed2e4fbcf73c4: Well, My Arm know 'bout goutweed farming.
textByHashes.de5aae223789b2e0cbcff3069966f626cf594e68: Uh... , what do we do now? If he kick us out, My Arm never gonna see Snowflake again. Help!
textByHashes.c0c4ab6baf8f149cbce4defe1dbc1193dbbb4e39: Yeah! Mother should try goutweed. It taste so good! Everything taste better with goutweed, an' My Arm know how to grow it.
textByHashes.01f46f139ba11401c66936f2648395c3dcb36817: Yeah, we really good at combat. Trolls near Stronghold, dey chuck rocks really hard. An' My Arm helped save da goutweed patch from big flappy bird thing!
textByHashes.4ff50921b5c6957903bd8609231c9fd304f72f22: Dis bird - it were really big though...
textByHashes.11cf056079a9f94e8a8ff33d1b3e19bb758cedd1: Yeah, My Arm not like how Mother talks to Snowflake.
textByHashes.bd69ec35a1256fc101ebe8385c272acfe43d62b8: Really? If My Arm start talking' bout what My Arm want to do with his daughter, he probably gonna get angry or freaked out.
textByHashes.8334a0e9dd7406d12eb56ac932f97f07dd87f6f9: Sorry, Mother, My Arm got nothing else. But My Arm not want to leave - can My Arm stay please?
textByHashes.665fad2c12c2fae6ef5e0acaa7eed616e0fa1c31: Oh, , My Arm is being sent home. Stupid big Mother not interested in goutweed. My Arm would prefer to stay with Snowflake.
textByHashes.87a8805e119a8861b6f14c538216ac6b2804494c: Mother should mind own business, an' not tell Snowflake who to marry.
textByHashes.1bb6a46933f2efc2c527c521b09658cdcae0d8d4: My Arm like plan too. My Arm marry Snowflake, an' she become boss of town, an' My Arm teach town to farm goutweed. Yup, good plan.
textByHashes.5720ac7af97a24b447dd8fdde5556f773845a21e: He look dumb, but he kinda big.
textByHashes.d59ad7172ad4176a8d1902bb60f7e6c52941e562: So if you all hate dis old man, how about My Arm kill him? Then Mother gonna really like My Arm! Old human sounds easy to kill.
textByHashes.63a38f604790795161a4ec00314fc4362ff519f4: Dat a shame. But he know you, , an' you helped him in fishy colony place. Maybe you ask him a favour now?
textByHashes.8e205276476799dc848128d20d7e05040d7adf08: He very obliging, dis mortal enemy of Weiss. Must have been big favour he owed . Okieday, give coffin to My Arm, an' My Arm give him to Mother.
textByHashes.16f44d447f6ee7139d9191146142e5b2e36fbf09: Okieday, now My Arm has Wise Old Man in box! We go show Mother now. Maybe he like My Arm for killing big enemy of trolls.
textByHashes.1e7f7a2f14ec54a28d8f030b89922375eeb8779f: Here, Mother, look what My Arm done! My Arm done killed your old enemy! He kick you out of Keldagrim long back, now My Arm got him dead in gift-box!
textByHashes.82048a34e3dc347ee7bd1d7eb4eef7e94562a08f: Yeah, let My Arm stay in Weiss please. Also, can My Arm marry your daughter?
textByHashes.f2279de009cdb73e7d1e30b1677782899b1f926b: My Arm not want to enter smelly hole!
textByHashes.2afffa8b2a9e0bc4967d7db347c39a46db8cdfd7: Mother did hit My Arm pretty hard.
textByHashes.6610975c958b154474f4800fcf0aafc93190ec59: is brave human an' good friend for My Arm and Snowflake!
textByHashes.6792678843a959b7a362de7c8f58ef4a5eeb0eb1: Okieday, we hang around here until you are.
textByHashes.1dc169163c5ea3151f127f6f418bd10b6ab48725: My Arm sorry 'bout your dad, Snowflake. But he kinda gonna kill us, anyway.
textByHashes.75b53dedb1bc0c95bf831469780e3d5e86670919: Yup, My Arm helped Snowflake kill him.
textByHashes.09abdab6a2302414a639a2dab9e0f3b6da00cf1b: My Arm will support Snowflake. My Arm will be at Snowflake's side. My Arm takes Snowflake by the hand for life.
textByHashes.0a88aeccd42dcaa47be0236439a5a50bd85db6d2: My Arm will be Snowflake's companion when sun shines an' life is bright. My Arm will be Snowflake's comfort in dark places.
textByHashes.7d6d65f186a1a448c86715b88a3dd9db70c545a9: Sure would have been easier gettin' up to dis place if My Arm could do tellypot like dat!
textByHashes.f399f6258809a01c286f2cdec7bf7a30890752a7: Yup, you good at dis stuff. My Arm been telling Snowflake how you fetched all kinda stuff to Stronghold for My Arm before.
textByHashes.ec91b715e04f5166c2f71aa9f13b2c091760eb4b: My Arm t'inks dis gonna work, yeah!
textByHashes.94aad156f9bd61b2cfae0870afff2be205e0b37f: She got trolls to use goat poo to make two herb patches! One for us to grow goutweed, an' one for you, 'cos you been good friend. We protect your stuff from disease.
textByHashes.6be33d2c8f81687f2c559f1d2ace6c82c094ee1f: You give it looksie now, an' see if you learn good stuff! Go on, Snowflake work hard on dis for you!
textByHashes.7d7338ae399c45ab33f78c36b76ffabe0f82c599: You read book from Snowflake yet? She work hard on it for you.
textByHashes.f7ca2be0467164501027f5dee86ff9245b43c6fc: Good! Now you know all Odd Mushroom's fire learnings, an' maybe they be useful to you.
textByHashes.4b3ab1361b564248eef60e482967bfed7b83de71: Herbie patches are outside Weiss, through gap in fence, west of town. One patch is for you, an' Boulder gonna protect it from disease for you.
textByHashes.9d8b42b987d3bb1ed3618136a7f5515bfa7b7a44: Dat's easy! You know we trolls named after der first thing wot we try to eat when we young?
textByHashes.e9528de4e0459c3cacb831baa9756ef4e2d0aef3: It were my dad's arm. I remember it look so big holding me, I just gotta give it a chew. So he done named me My Arm.
textByHashes.127ee29f7de77972e6458d10c3f6f3d2835690de: Well, I seen worse. Most humans come through here, dey got names with like all numbers and things wot aren't even words! I met some man earlier wot called himself .
textByHashes.bef18737ae246778500f9afa27bd1d17b7764490: Well, I seen worse. Most humans come through here, dey got names with like all numbers and things wot aren't even words! I met some woman earlier wot called himself .
textByHashes.c64f79e64a03e745484be61b3f79999b1adc6f01: Well, I seen worse. Most humans come through here, dey got names with like all numbers and things wot aren't even words! I met some man earlier wot called herself .
textByHashes.6838340965fce351621486d4d303e8bab5c334c0: Well, I seen worse. Most humans come through here, dey got names with like all numbers and things wot aren't even words! I met some woman earlier wot called herself .
textByHashes.98aba6bf45121f4c184b524ec68627cf8b0c84e6: Well, I seen worse. Most humans come through here, dey got names with like all numbers and things wot aren't even words!
textByHashes.5f8a4868e909cba70ead4e03cda2fc0314004250: If you happy 'bout my name now, I tell you 'bout dis farming job.
textByHashes.e1f35b8887a2fbc51bf765ed4e0c424c06826fdf: Okieday. Now, I heard 'bout dese gouty thingies before. Da cooks up on Death Plateau were saying dey cooked a man wot had a lump in his pocket dat tasted like goutweed, but wasn't goutweed.
textByHashes.1cb9d7b08b77022a99a24fe4809d9be59c3d9e71: My Arm is thinking this is da thingy we need.
textByHashes.13c4ec8d71792b68bb14f9033744dafdd0d22e5c: You go to Death Plateau and search da big cooking pot for da goutweedy lump!
textByHashes.a449e636171c174be9d49e6d6639a8552988945e: Just do as I say, yah?
textByHashes.4fd3382187cace3714de04b498fcd14d768a59dd: I not want to see your tuber! My Arm is organised troll who gets one thing done at a time. I need da goutweedy lump from da cooking pot on Death Plateau.
textByHashes.60eefd472ce8173a2884c16e76f4a064cd75b53b: Never mind tubers. You fetch me da goutweedy lump from da cooking pot of Dung 'n' Ash on Death Plateau.
textByHashes.7d6a1978c86891aaae44a1b4c8055579e16506c3: Go see Burntmeat - he give good directions for getting there.
textByHashes.5af49c89b4eae5b85a7b8a84387625ca8cf2091e: You got da goutweedy lump yet?
textByHashes.0aeafc955d5fccec5be10ac14a514afd5a68bcfd: You go getting yourself a move on, yah? My Arm getting bored. Ask Burntmeat if you needin' help findin' da place.
textByHashes.48e494be518af97ff59595eaff0830c46f6f066c: You is a bit forgetful. If you like, My Arm give you nice tap on head to clear out cobbiewebs from brain.
textByHashes.00633c3b542ff9ebbf4bef5abe8819ad1b10666e: Okieday, maybe some other time. Now, what you gotta do is go to Death Plateau and fetch me da goutweedy lump from da big cooking pot.
textByHashes.fd812c1885c6d3995a3e0f974fd0eb6e08ba5b91: Perhaps you is a bit thick in da head. Ask Burntmeat if you needin' help findin' da place.
textByHashes.e6ffa735e68eba685691e7d44b29a36bd3547152: Huh. It looking a bit tatty...
textByHashes.1af19a34cece6a181f93a7b40d4740fa1e08fb20: Yep, it tasting like goutweed too.
textByHashes.a33e644da85af561d74313f4806a77ef1aca11a5: Well, now My Arm know dese goutweedy lump things exist, you help me grow one, yah?
textByHashes.d2ad1d6d2ea7d28c77ac5fd6a52e1fed5ff35bf8: My Arm done tried farming before. I stick all kindsa things in da ground, but nothing ever grow, not even when I water 'em.
textByHashes.605b4b942f1ad71df358a5e4adedfe5a28fe6f39: I bin planting everythin', . Sticks, rocks, dead goats... you name it.
textByHashes.eac536bcb137867f5eaa42d75f86dd00eed43547: Nope, not even a smidgen. My Arm dug 'em up again to see.
textByHashes.73b53e592b40e728d930e8d883044d283106e0e0: Yah, My Arm found a nice farmer and ate him, but he not help much. He taste kinda boring too.
textByHashes.8f0a6a2cf8485649e5ee412a9a77bc7bbfe84547: My ol' mum say I clever enough. What you getting at?
textByHashes.2ffe8939c9284b190b3e33a05b7d1d2240a148c6: Sure t'ing, Player. I show you...
textByHashes.5e69284bd31c5a4e2d05ce79ab60ce4c36af7110: You done good fetching dat goutweedy lump. My Arm very impressed.
textByHashes.2a2f18d107a0c452cd926e1fb9a0ee8a1154bde9: Dis is my quiet place. No other trolls come up here. It where I bin trying to grow stuff.
textByHashes.c5a16c88ea39b3bc4f6ea20ef865763d3b30c94a: Dat is good, cos you smellin' distinctly whiffy. It like you got all dung in your pockets or something. Or maybe you needing a wash.
textByHashes.c10e61bd194703ba2b54401d8433d0a6b8de2412: Okieday, maybe My Arm imagining da smell.
textByHashes.8b2b8724b480746dc9fbed73c1071b129089bd60: Yup, but My Arm not mind. We trolls not get blown around by wind like diddy little humans.
textByHashes.a3cda9bd4087d8e53f651700251e0d8a3edfd784: I t'ink so, yah. I got book 'bout farming for you to read.
textByHashes.007f2b58300b5aa534803b0153f8f1f5d26ba33f: Dat farmer I ate had a book with him. My Arm is hopin' you knows how to read.
textByHashes.44cf93da727fa11894eeb09d0f5c591b3f3468d7: My Arm not know what in book, so you read it, yuh? Perhaps it tell you how to grow t'ings up on mountain.
textByHashes.b0053f21aab0c4b42f295135d3db958256ce6091: You know how to read book I got off farmer?
textByHashes.c2e435fa64a61595c803a347bb98bf915d25fed3: If you forget how to read, it not a problem. My Arm give you little tap on head and maybe you remember again, no trouble.
textByHashes.0cc4f513ce560713971f581cc26834a280080e23: Dat's good. Is it any use?
textByHashes.3f886e670b051d760cc1280559601e4f461fba2e: Urgh. Dat's a lotta camel dung.
textByHashes.61550611691898ff6597cdff3989f3b9c47ba2eb: My Arm not like to say so earlier, but you bin smellin' like you done a whoopsie.
textByHashes.24cd8ebc5c28b09d0de2956e0c481c569093913b: Why you think trolls keep dung in Stronghold? Do you keep dung in your house?
textByHashes.e277994162a633797e51b455e93c537122a717df: You could go ask a camel for some dung. I bet dey got plenty.
textByHashes.2d1256622d61b1cbb557d1c1a564e8000ab37708: Best way to get somefing: find someone who got plenty of it wot they don't want.
textByHashes.0935549cd2f5a91376388cf0a348f556781a2640: Clever human. Off you go now.
textByHashes.298947780492c7d54174324074e6f699747c98e4: That could help. Off you go now.
textByHashes.9a72981f247a5e94c5a1a3a3b65459aa605bb6f9: Wot a shame; off you go now.
textByHashes.979fc0d2ad635f778906cbed0a2cfec03cd8cf18: My Arm is sure you'll find some way to get dung out of a camel. Now trot along.
textByHashes.22e7561d6314840f924231f70a370b3d3b4249f5: You put all dat dung and stuff in da soil yet?
textByHashes.e695b48768f2ebad9c7dccf2d74377a0143e0d0d: Good, good. Always I bin wanting a farming patch to grow things in. Da soggy bits south of here, they not work at all.
textByHashes.f1488aca6baba390aa4151be940f46d1e4c78e10: Now we do like dat man say to Burntmeat. We gotta go to Tai Bwo Wannai Village and see Murcaily 'bout growing goutweed.
textByHashes.ed5af779d8bed5b1f3e80346baa52e0b83eb185e: I not wanna be gettin' confused with your tuber. Man tell Burntmeat we need to go see Murcaily to grow goutweed, so dat where we going.
textByHashes.53d5033092e530ea40a17c2953f87e994d22573e: Trolls not flexible creatures. Humans too flexible; dey got little necks wot snap easy as anything.
textByHashes.86ec27eaf3a54354653d3a5370e27a81a8aa5d21: My Arm tried to eat it.
textByHashes.bc631b37cc31dfea6746f52186cf8b3a565b5a18: You ever hear stories of troll sailors or troll pirates?
textByHashes.da593a3232d0ad49e707aec69f7f152b4c1b9cd8: Dat 'cos trolls don't like da sea. We kinda sink.
textByHashes.afeb8ec23a463595662a15c3a923b247f7b0aee5: Them not proper trolls. Proper trolls live in mountains.
textByHashes.3813c2df938733abcb17d69fc72bd73f862684ff: We trolls. Them not trolls. 'Nuff said.
textByHashes.f997f81c01486bc5dc773499412452dd5a66b694: You gettin' angry with My Arm, huh?
textByHashes.247ebdaff459c523afd19365d445b389074731cf: We will meet at dat village, yah?
textByHashes.42e77312f41e16c6311b93ea61b420285a31456f: Okieday, My Arm gonna let you do the talking. He not seem to like me standin' here.
textByHashes.a5c5e5db9a6ea1bb7e61efb3bfcc166f158e08cf: So dis is Tai Bwo Wannai Village, huh?
textByHashes.76a1e7b5c104c46ab0ad897317a8c1cd055c2960: You doin' a lot of favours for people. Is dere anything in it for you?
textByHashes.ea0a7ac8f715f7be7c8c3197112a69f9a297dd91: Dat a pity. He planning to give you more burnt meat when you done helpin' me. Maybe My Arm think of something better for you. But first you go find Murcaily - he gotta help us grow goutweed.
textByHashes.906ec679a82c9dab77a0fd5de0e02ff28ac27891: You done spoken to Murcaily 'bout goutweed yet?
textByHashes.520eb6e698acb0d29cbab6711a0ce718510e390e: You slow. My Arm gettin' bored.
textByHashes.52b0232172a2e89cc797b1cbe4fc3a1c54fd9b9d: You take far too long chattin' with Murcaily. My Arm come in to hurry things up.
textByHashes.ea3b7a105797c6fdc914ac08b34d8f08ddd6a552: Silly humans got such flimsy homes. One good thump an' der walls come down.
textByHashes.7baf32d6c9542be0e5dd557edfaa62323127da5c: Anyway, you got da goutweedy stuff, right?
textByHashes.2ac50ba15bff94640104d8147d0ed3084b8409ec: Right. Let's get back to da ship an' go back to Ardougne. My Arm fink you need to go to da bank.
textByHashes.31d09368a9d6b5aaffb3177cfb3b4b6286923adf: See, , My Arm done tried planting stuff before, an' da birds around Trollheim Mountain, dey got... interested.
textByHashes.e4158776339dfe52b2cf9050bd34bad5443c6ff6: Yuh, an' dere was a great BIG one wot started trying to eat whatever I planted.
textByHashes.9d744c80c1edc3e06d9303a11731de728afc10c6: It pretty BIG. You might wanna get some food an' stuff.
textByHashes.84d38cef44df7fc37970a4ee184d585c58c79c1d: How 'bout we just go back to Ardougne so you can get your fightin' stuff...
textByHashes.8c757e5cb8e74c3000b6508752cc2ba094b63e4c: Dat captain didn't look very happy to see us again.
textByHashes.dd5df5784b7629f1036131cbcdbaace6200fac16: What was dat you said to him?
textByHashes.a00494476cdb4a0cdfeb38daf8336b2ecf218e93: You probably wanna go to bank now to fetch yer fightin' stuff. When you finished, go back to da Troll Stronghold. My Arm gonna be waitin' by our farming patch on da roof.
textByHashes.016e3ee19f110a686bc78eb8beb8e317714be5f9: You is dumber than a spotted kebbit! Go back an' ask Murcaily for some more!
textByHashes.1d51e490f9da089df5358a1277213d814ca99350: It mean somefing like 'Home sweet home' in some old language. My Arm is well ed-oo-cated troll, not some no-brain rockhead.
textByHashes.f9beb11638d500cc99ac4b9eae353b85c4671909: Yup, dat sound good. You show me how to do dat.
textByHashes.13d67e6ee4acbe8cd59a03b1ca44ff550934bb5d: I not go to all dis trouble to grow weedies! You supposed to help me grow goutweed!
textByHashes.d057cb648db10c0d0c88da7c9571ca49f49fc098: You give me what stuff I need to use on da patch and I use it. And hurry up, My Arm gettin' bored.
textByHashes.f6d1525e9f7e146aa94aab50fb63671a31e88fcf: Okieday, you gimme a rake an' My Arm do it.
textByHashes.c6ba246fe31ae95cb1daec0201726bdd6fe68eaf: I can't get da goutweed thing in da ground with all these weeds here.
textByHashes.494fc3a02b44af020318708396ea0703f417b89d: Da weedies look healthy enough, t'anks.
textByHashes.d79cb036b146a7071ac20207fe29017d8e9b4eda: Da spade not working on dese weedies.
textByHashes.c29e19d706d350c664ea8e06e41a0be8d28c5c93: I not sure what you want me to do with dat.
textByHashes.56d74849ee15ad44f2c7a97bb178c9c12703a182: I not want your bitty bit of paper.
textByHashes.22e32a5335ac9c5871be88f25853cd44c0a9bb1c: I t'ink we already treated da soil.
textByHashes.6722e0a2dae47c1a12fc5fe09318f7a185bfc34b: What you t'ink I want with a stick, huh?
textByHashes.93d8904550954381ed5284f7e2fd5c6a9f4579df: After dat you probably wanna give me da hardy gout tuber thingies, an' maybe somefing to poke 'em into da soil.
textByHashes.b9e051df48d7e3360ff2aac4a1a3773ee1f7bf3f: Also, I got plenty of da hardy gout tuber thingies, but I gonna need somefing to poke 'em into da soil.
textByHashes.9253c447a3e958aab49741f013c4dd916d044943: Don't I need somefing to plant?
textByHashes.6b5f0e00b76f4f0e0e1fdebd46652317d4f96864: Uh-oh - I fink da birds noticed us farming...
textByHashes.da979f0d8ffd8ad836d357039c9fa170a03bea0e: It gonna eat da goutweed - kill it, quick!
textByHashes.863a85c0ad834c139106f5805042013ee1998b3c: T'anks for saving da goutweed, . But I fink dis other birdie not happy with you...
textByHashes.92fb26f0aea61a8f88dbc5e6fe5207a0481f6a3a: Ah, lovely goutweed all grown up.
textByHashes.f1242ce356ee9d5d47312fba402e4fbcf1065f53: T'ank you very much for da kind offer, but My Arm not really needin' one of those just now.
textByHashes.91398eae6ef7004ccde86276811a21cb35b6d52f: T'ank you so much for all da help! Burntmeat gonna be very pleased.
textByHashes.b1eed8d3672efbf063fb5f56c14b03beaf844fef: My Arm just check dis da right stuff...
textByHashes.1df8977eda2f289681177caa014aca2ceda15c81: Yup, dis is goutweed. It lovverley.
textByHashes.a935cc17d40db3c4915f94ae3813117004279419: You gotta go back to kitchen an' tell Burntmeat da good news. Maybe he give you nice reward for all da hard work you bin doin' for us. But if he not give you anyfing good, you come back an' see My Arm.
textByHashes.13a08a6706c12654d4cc636a99b283fa24b329e4: Did Burntmeat give you nice reward?
textByHashes.b0e40325115b38a50f8d2e7908dd62b95b09a2bc: He downstairs in da kitchen. An' if he give you somefing rubbish, come tell My Arm. Maybe I can reward you better.
textByHashes.78793aa5242352561ab5ca64b5a29415744fdad1: Aww, dat a shame. See, Burntmeat like burnt meat. It his favourite thing to cook, an' he do it better than any other troll.
textByHashes.1e663ba4bb161455c62904342e18d55571e417ec: Yup, an' I will. My Arm gonna tell you big hushy-hushy secret about herbs...
textByHashes.094590c556de8d8567ec92b5b509184f9d27503d: Now you know more 'bout herbs. Also, I made a new farming patch like you showed me. Whatever you plant in it, I make sure it don't get disease.
textByHashes.9b89ac0cafac2812d6591ced75b494450465dcc9: If you want unusual, Goat Poo says he see da weirdness down in mine.
textByHashes.b4c09abb35640d1af10109b63e784883ac82def5: He say he see da strange shadow.
textByHashes.9ecaec6852c5d895e6f06ea0b20b4e76b53d1c60: Did you find da weirdness down in mine?
textByHashes.23eb432a0d7826e1ec1eb32ed4c856a147b2234e: Snowflake an' My Arm very happy. Maybe new herbie patch not da only place where new life gonna be growin' soon!
textByHashes.3575e5279ec63ff708bc12d2cf2f6bcf8d3fcf8f: Dem trolls likin' da goutweed too!
textByHashes.b96217e59d82230d25ebf613d7d015d01bd77452: That doesn't look solved to me.
